note.FR: Degats de competence +48%. Arme signature Dregs of Glimmer pas encore importee dans la base.
note.EN: Skill Damage +48%. Signature weapon Dregs of Glimmer not yet imported in the database.

note.FR: Focus Intensite de competence + Degats de competence + Morale Pyro. Tolerance 126/100.
note.EN: Focus Skill Intensity + Skill DMG + Pyro Morale. Tolerance 126/100.

note.FR: DPS Pyro principal — Camilla l'amplifie via son passif Robe Roses-Tintees (Morale aux allies Pyro).
note.EN: Main Pyro DPS — Camilla amplifies via her Rose-Tinted Dress passive (Morale to Pyro allies).

note.FR: Intensite de competence, soins, boucliers et Lucidite.
note.EN: Skill Intensity, healing, shields and Sanity recovery.

note.FR: Source principale de degats; lance les Lames de Sommelier accumulees.
note.EN: Primary damage source; launches stored Sommelier Blades.

note.FR: Coeur du kit; invoque 8 Lames de Sommelier qui orbitent.
note.EN: Core of the kit; summons 8 orbiting Sommelier Blades.

note.FR: Buff de degats, Morale et restauration de Lucidite alliee.
note.EN: Damage buff, Morale and ally Sanity recovery.

notes.FR: Camilla est une Sub-DPS Pyro centree sur l'usage actif de son ultime Valse pourpre, qui orbite 8 Lames de Sommelier autour d'elle. Pairing optimal en sub-DPS pour Lynn (DPS Pyro principale). Note: arme signature Dregs of Glimmer pas encore dans la base de donnees.
notes.EN: Camilla is a Pyro Sub-DPS centered on actively using her ultimate Claret Waltz, which orbits 8 Sommelier Blades around her. Optimal as sub-DPS for Lynn (main Pyro DPS). Note: signature weapon Dregs of Glimmer not yet in the database.
